locale.label: Interface language
locale.description: Same approach as the public site (French / English). Admin labels follow your choice; database content (projects, etc.) stays as you enter it.

dashboard.name: Dashboard
dashboard.heading: Overview
dashboard.description: Content stats, recent activity and indicators.

experiences.name: Experience
experiences.heading: Work experience
experiences.description: Timeline of your career and roles.

services.name: Services
services.heading: Services
services.description: Offers and services shown on the site.

testimonials.name: Testimonials
testimonials.heading: Client testimonials
testimonials.description: Quotes and recommendations shown on the portfolio.

contact.name: Messages
contact.heading: Contact form
contact.description: Inbound requests (details, service, budget, message) as on the site.

login.title: Secure area
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the admin
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while signing in
login.footerHint: Restricted access. Unauthorized attempts may be logged.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Interface theme (synced with the header control).

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Logo, text under the visual and labels: stored locally and in Supabase.
sidebar.logoUploaded: Logo uploaded. It appears in the sidebar.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Page opened automatically after a successful sign-in on this device.

interface.title: Interface
interface.sidebarCompactDesc: On large screens: icons only, tooltips on hover.
interface.reduceMotionDesc: Shortens transitions and animations in the admin.

layout.title: Content layout
layout.description: Main panel margins (in addition to compact sidebar).

banner.title: Banner & header
banner.description: Text shown under the toolbar on all pages, and header options.
banner.headerMinimalDesc: Hides the long description under the title (keeps title and actions).
banner.routeCrumbDesc: Shows the page path with one-click copy.

dashboardPrefs.title: Dashboard
dashboardPrefs.description: Activity date display and stat refresh.
dashboardPrefs.autoRefreshDesc: Reloads dashboard stats about every 45 seconds while the tab is open.

health.title: Supabase diagnostics
health.description: Checks public env vars and a simple read on the about table. No secrets are returned to the browser.
health.error: Could not reach the diagnostics endpoint.

publicSite.title: Public site
publicSite.description: Optional shortcut to open your public portfolio from the console.

backup.title: Local backup
backup.description: Export or import a JSON preferences file (same or another machine).
backup.resetDescription: Resets local settings (theme unchanged), sidebar, post-login navigation and shortcuts to defaults on this device. Does not delete any site data.
backup.toastResetLocal: All local preferences have been reset.

sync.title: Supabase sync
sync.description: Settings are stored locally and copied to admin_console_settings (columns + preferences_extra JSON). Reloaded on startup if the row exists.
sync.toastPullEmpty: No admin_console_settings row — save once to create it.

profile.title: Console profile
profile.description: Identity from the “Profile & home” record (about table) and your session.
